steps: Launch the app at 1280x800 (resize the window if needed).
Open DevTools (Ctrl+Shift+I).
In the Elements panel, select the in the sidebar.
Read the computed CSS width.
Confirm width is >=140 px and <=144 px.
At 1280x800, select the wordmark in DevTools.
Read its bounding-client-rect right edge.
Select the sidebar container (.flex.flex-col.w-40.h-full ...) and read its right edge.
Confirm the wordmark right edge is <= the sidebar container right edge.
Inspect the src attribute.
Confirm it resolves to the existing toaster_text.svg asset (imported at src/components/Sidebar.tsx:4).
Confirm no new image file was added under the repository root or src/.
Launch the app at 1280x800.
Open the Editor section from the sidebar.
In DevTools, select the <div class="max-w-... w-full mx-auto space-y-6"> inside EditorView.
Read its computed CSS width.
Confirm width is >=1024 px.
At 1280x800, in DevTools select the sidebar and the editor root container.
Read the right edge of the sidebar and the left edge of the editor root container.
Confirm the difference is <= 8 px (the surviving outer horizontal padding).
At 1280x800, navigate to the About settings pane and select its root <div class="max-w-... w-full mx-auto ...">; read width.
Repeat for the Advanced, History, and Models settings panes.
Confirm each measured width is >= 960 px.
Resize the window to 720x800.
Open the Editor view.
In DevTools console run: document.documentElement.scrollWidth <= window.innerWidth.
Confirm the result is true.
Resize the window to 1920x1080.
Open the Editor view.
In DevTools, select the editor root container and read its computed CSS width.
Confirm width is <= 1152 px (the max-w-6xl cap).
Resize the window to 720x800.
In DevTools, select the wordmark and the sidebar container.
Confirm the wordmark right edge is <= the sidebar right edge.
At 1280x800, open the Editor view.
Visually confirm, in this top-to-bottom order: the import-media block, the project-actions block, the transcription-start block, and the edit-toolbar block.
Cross-reference EditorView.tsx lines 402, 484, 500, 527 to confirm every SettingsGroup heading still renders.
At 1280x800, open the About settings pane.
Confirm the description paragraph (AboutSettings.tsx:62) renders fully without horizontal clipping or overflow.
From the repository root, run: bun run test:e2e.
Confirm the suite (tests/app.spec.ts, tests/transcriptEdit.spec.ts, tests/exportPipeline.spec.ts, tests/settingsRoundTrip.spec.ts, tests/skipSchedule.spec.ts) reports 0 failures.
From the repository root, run: git diff --unified=0 -- src/ | Select-String -Pattern '^\+.*#[0-9A-Fa-f]{3,8}\b'.
Confirm the result is empty (no new color literal lines were added).
Spot-check the diff to confirm only Tailwind width / margin / padding / max-width tokens changed.
